proposedFilter.includeDecision: include = Step2 namespace/deck AND clinical taxonomy signal AND not image-only/basic-only/Step1-only

imageEstimate.primaryImageSelectionPlan: rank by clinical tag match, then referenced image proximity to fact text, then non-logo/non-icon dimensions after extraction; select at most one primary image per MedicalFact plus secondary images when strongly associated

filterReviewNotes: PANCE clinical tags were discovered but are excluded from the first pass because the request asks for clinically relevant Step 2 content.
Step 1 tags with OME::Clinical exist, but are excluded unless also in the Step 2 namespace; this prevents importing Step 1-only clinical/basic crossover cards prematurely.
Anatomy, embryo, histology, molecular/cell biology, biochemistry, and physiology branches are excluded unless carried by Step 2 clinical taxonomy.
Sketchy/Pixorize image-heavy branches are excluded unless linked to Step 2 clinical tags/decks.
